toolSpec.name: calculate_disposal_score
toolSpec.description: Evaluates disposal guidelines for dangerous goods to determine a severity score based on disposal complexity and environmental impact requirements

product_id.description: Unique identifier for the product (format: P_XXXXX)

disposal_guidelines.description: Detailed text describing the proper disposal procedures and requirements for the dangerous goods

toolSpec.name: calculate_handling_score
toolSpec.description: Analyzes handling and storage guidelines to determine a severity score based on storage requirements and handling protocols

product_id.description: Unique identifier for the dangerous good product (format: P_XXXXX)

handling_and_storage_guidelines.description: Detailed text describing the handling procedures and storage requirements for the dangerous good

assessmentFormId.description: Reference ID for the Classification Assessment Form (CAF-01) where the score will be documented

toolSpec.name: calculate_transportation_score
toolSpec.description: Evaluates transportation requirements for dangerous goods to determine a severity score based on shipping restrictions and handling protocols

product_id.description: Unique identifier for the product (format: P_XXXXX)

transportation_requirements.description: Detailed description of transportation requirements, restrictions, and protocols for shipping the dangerous goods

toolSpec.name: calculate_sds_label_score
toolSpec.description: Analyzes safety data sheet (SDS) hazard statements and calculates a severity score

product_id.description: Unique identifier for the product being evaluated (format: P_XXXXX)

sds_label_text.description: Hazard statements extracted from Section 2 of the Safety Data Sheet (SDS)
